company.name: Bayer AG (Pharmaceuticals division)
company.subtitle: Pharma-only model | EUR 17.83B / $20B 2025 (-2%) | Xarelto/Eylea cliffs offset by Nubeqa+Kerendia growth | Lynkuet launch | EXCLUDES Crop Science (€22B) + Consumer Health (€6B)
company.cashRunway: Self-funding (€5B+ op cash flow Pharma); group-level Roundup litigation overhang (~€10B reserve)

assets.name: Xarelto (rivaroxaban) — Factor Xa inhibitor (Bayer ROW; JNJ US)

indications.name: AF stroke prevention + VTE + ACS (ex-US Bayer; US JNJ)

market.notes: Factor Xa inhibitor. Bayer books ROW; JNJ books US (~$2.5B JNJ-share 2025; LOE Nov 2025). Bayer EU LOE 2024+; ROW LOE rolling. Severe decline 2026 (-35-40% guidance). Class peers: Eliquis (BMS/Pfizer), Lixiana (Daiichi).

market.notes: Heritage tail (~$4.9B): Adalat (nifedipine CCV legacy ~€700M), Cipro (ciprofloxacin antibiotic, generic), Glucobay (acarbose T2D, ROW), Levitra (vardenafil ED, generic), Avelox (moxifloxacin), Diane-35, Iressa (gefitinib via Astrazeneca alliance ROW residual), Bayer Pharma Asia ROW alliance, Other Pharma revenue (~$1B).

mega_bear.narrative: Xarelto/Eylea cliffs accelerate; Roundup litigation continues; Lynkuet slow; Crop Science drag
events: X Eylea biosim takes 50% share by 2027

bear.narrative: Pharma -3% 2026 with Xarelto/Eylea cliff; Nubeqa+Kerendia drive growth from 2027

base.narrative: Nubeqa €3B + Kerendia €3B + Adempas + Verquvo + Lynkuet drive growth post-2026; Eylea HD steady
events: V Nubeqa €3B peak ARANOTE 1L mHSPC mono + ARASENS combo
V Kerendia €3B+ across CKD T2D + HFmrEF/HFpEF
V Eylea HD 8mg holds 50% of franchise post-biosim

bull.narrative: Nubeqa+Kerendia €8B combined; Lynkuet menopause franchise; Roundup resolved
events: V Nubeqa adj NSCLC + earlier-line expansions

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Multi-franchise + Roundup resolved + Crop Science divest unlocks value
events: V Crop Science + Consumer Health divestiture unlocks Pharma

lastData.title: FY2025 Pharma EUR 17.83B / ~$20B (-2%); Group EUR 45.6B. Xarelto/Eylea cliffs offset by Nubeqa+Kerendia growth (combined €3.2B 2025). 2026 guide: more Pharma decline before 2027 inflection.
points: Eylea -6% to EUR 3.1B (biosim pressure; Eylea HD 8mg offsetting; -20-25% 2026 guide)
Nubeqa +50% to ~EUR 2B (ARANOTE 1L mHSPC mono + ARASENS combo)
Kerendia +67% to ~EUR 1.2B (CKD T2D + HFmrEF/HFpEF FINEARTS-HF Ph3 positive)
Lynkuet (elinzanetant NK1/NK3 menopause VMS) FDA approved 2025; class leader vs Veozah
Vitrakvi (NTRK tumor-agnostic) + Stivarga + Aliqopa oncology tail
Asundexian (Factor XIa) Ph3 OCEANIC-AF FAILED Nov 2024 (futility) -- major pipeline setback
MODEL EXCLUDES: Crop Science (~EUR 22B) + Consumer Health (~EUR 6B)

nextCatalyst.title: Kerendia HFmrEF/HFpEF FDA + Lynkuet first full year + BAY 2927088 NSCLC Ph3
thresholds: H1 2026: Kerendia HFmrEF/HFpEF FDA approval expansion
H2 2026: BAY 2927088 SOHO-01 HER2-mutant NSCLC Ph3 readout
2027: Pharma division returns to growth (per Bayer guidance)

risks: Eylea biosim pressure (Pavblu Amgen, Sandoz Enzeevu, Samsung Opuviz) + Eylea HD partial offset
Asundexian Ph3 OCEANIC-AF FAILED Nov 2024 (Factor XIa class question)
Roundup glyphosate litigation (~€10B reserve; settlement ongoing)
Nubeqa vs Pluvicto (Novartis Lu-177 PSMA) for advanced prostate
Kerendia vs SGLT2is (Farxiga, Jardiance) in CKD/HF
Group-level Crop Science herbicide regulatory pressure
EUR strength vs USD impacts reported Pharma sales
